'''âm-s-s''' ('''kamasas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unaccent|unaccent]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unaccent|unaccent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| kamasas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimasas|thimasas]] || [[word:jimasas|jimasas]] || [[word:shimasas|shimasas]] || [[word:kimasas|kimasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumasas|thuthumasas]] || [[word:jujumasas|jujumasas]] || [[word:shushumasas|shushumasas]] || [[word:kukumasas|kukumasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumasas|thumasas]] || [[word:jumasas|jumasas]] || [[word:shumasas|shumasas]] || [[word:kumasas|kumasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumasas|thumasas]] || [[word:jumasas|jumasas]] || [[word:shumasas|shumasas]] || [[word:kumasas|kumasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themasas|themasas]] || [[word:jemasas|jemasas]] || [[word:shemasas|shemasas]] || [[word:kemasas|kemasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomasas|thothomasas]] || [[word:jojomasas|jojomasas]] || [[word:shoshomasas|shoshomasas]] || [[word:kokomasas|kokomasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomasas|thomasas]] || [[word:jomasas|jomasas]] || [[word:shomasas|shomasas]] || [[word:komasas|komasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomasas|thomasas]] || [[word:jomasas|jomasas]] || [[word:shomasas|shomasas]] || [[word:komasas|komasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmasas|thĂŠmasas]] || [[word:jĂŠmasas|jĂŠmasas]] || [[word:shĂŠmasas|shĂŠmasas]] || [[word:kĂŠmasas|kĂŠmasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamasas|thathamasas]] || [[word:jajamasas|jajamasas]] || [[word:shashamasas|shashamasas]] || [[word:kakamasas|kakamasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamasas|thamasas]] || [[word:jamasas|jamasas]] || [[word:shamasas|shamasas]] || [[word:kamasas|kamasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamasas|thamasas]] || [[word:jamasas|jamasas]] || [[word:shamasas|shamasas]] || [[word:kamasas|kamasas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamasas|shamasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamasas|goshamasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamasas|gokishamasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamasasnĂŒ|shamasasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamasasnknĂŒ|goshamasasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasasnĂŒ|gokishamasasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamasashĂ«|shamasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamasasnkshĂ«|goshamasasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamasashĂ«|gokishamasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasasro|shamasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasasnkro|goshamasasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasasro|gokishamasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasasmu|shamasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasasnkmu|goshamasasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasasmu|gokishamasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamasasher|shamasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamasasnksher|goshamasasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamasasher|gokishamasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamasasng|shamasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamasasnkng|goshamasasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamasasng|gokishamasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamasasya|shamasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamasasnkya|goshamasasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamasasya|gokishamasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamasasyam|shamasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamasasnkyam|goshamasasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamasasyam|gokishamasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasasnĂŒshĂ«|shamasasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamasasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamasasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasasnĂŒro|shamasasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasasnknĂŒro|goshamasasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasasnĂŒro|gokishamasasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasasnĂŒmu|shamasasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasasnknĂŒmu|goshamasasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasasnĂŒmu|gokishamasasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasashĂ«nĂŒ|shamasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamasasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasashĂ«ro|shamasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasasnkshĂ«ro|goshamasasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasashĂ«ro|gokishamasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasashĂ«mu|shamasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasasnkshĂ«mu|goshamasasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasashĂ«mu|gokishamasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasasronĂŒ|shamasasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasasnkronĂŒ|goshamasasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasasronĂŒ|gokishamasasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasasroshĂ«|shamasasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasasnkroshĂ«|goshamasasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasasroshĂ«|gokishamasasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasasromu|shamasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasasnkromu|goshamasasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasasromu|gokishamasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasasmunĂŒ|shamasasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasasnkmunĂŒ|goshamasasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasasmunĂŒ|gokishamasasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasasmushĂ«|shamasasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasasnkmushĂ«|goshamasasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasasmushĂ«|gokishamasasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasasmuro|shamasasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasasnkmuro|goshamasasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasasmuro|gokishamasasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|654f723}}
